payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Partial/edge-cropped view of a dark-stained wooden side table with two tiers; ornate curved legs, a lower shelf holding a woven basket, and small decorative objects on the top surface are visible; appears scuffed and medium-sized, roughly 1.2 meters from the camera.
